## Meeting Purpose

## Key Takeaways

  - [Diligent: Strategy approved, content quality praised; maintaining 20 refreshes/month](https://fathom.video/share/1tJuz3ZFbrUtFWdXT_zgZ1nRS6tB7C-t?tab=summary&timestamp=49.0)
